query: SELECT config_key, config_value, label, category FROM game_config WHERE category IN ('balance','stat','engine') OR config_key LIKE '%cap%' OR config_key LIKE '%max_hp%' OR config_key LIKE '%max_atk%' ORDER BY config_key LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT config_key, config_value, label, category FROM game_config WHERE category IN ('balance','stat','engine') OR config_key LIKE '%cap%' OR config_key LIKE '%max_hp%' OR config_key LIKE '%max_atk%' ORDER BY config_key LIMIT 30;
